description: Comment-like text appears inside a prompt string and should not be treated as source comments.
stagedPatch:
diff --git a/src/prompt.ts b/src/prompt.ts
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/prompt.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+export const reviewPrompt = `
+// Explain the decision.
+// List any tradeoffs.
+// Mention edge cases.
+// Return JSON only.
+`;
+
+export function promptFor(name: string) {
+  return reviewPrompt.replace("decision", name);
+}
